name: @gjsify/example-dom-three-geometry-teapot
description: Three.js geometry teapot example ported from refs/three/examples/webgl_geometry_teapot.html with Adwaita controls

scripts.build: yarn build:gjs && yarn build:browser && yarn build:assets
scripts.build:assets: cp -f src/browser/index.html dist/index.html && cp -f src/browser/webgl.css dist/webgl.css && cp -rf src/assets dist/assets && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp -f ../../../refs/adwaita-fonts/sans/AdwaitaSans-Regular.ttf dist/fonts/

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
